help.title: Need Help?
help.subtitle: Quickly find the guides and instructions you need
help.guide_invest_desc: Deal Pool → Deal → Docs → Approval Workflow
help.guide_clawswarm_desc: Config → Goal → AI Decomposition → DAG Review
help.guide_welcome_desc: Return to welcome dialog and choose again
help.invest_dashboard_text: Your investment hub. View to-dos, material gaps, or click 'View Settings' in the top-right to adjust display modules.
help.pool_text: Enter early-stage leads here — no need for completeness. Just add the project name and stage. Promote to Deal when ready.
help.pipeline_text: Active deals are shown here by stage. Click a deal card to view details, add materials, or start an approval.
help.workflows_text: Pending approvals are listed here. Ensure all materials are complete before initiating an approval.
help.models_text: Configure AI inference capabilities here. Agents can only function after a model is added. Start with a default primary model.
help.agents_text: Create and manage Agents. Each Agent has its own identity, model, and workspace.
help.channels_text: Connect Agents to external platforms (QQ, Telegram, etc.). Requires an available Agent and Gateway first.
help.chat_text: Chat directly with an Agent. Send the first message to verify the Agent is working properly.
help.gateway_text: Gateway bridges Agents and models. Ensure it shows 'Running' status, otherwise Agents cannot respond.
help.setup_text: Start here for first-time use. Confirm that Node.js, CLI, and config files are all ready.
help.star_office_text: Pixel-art Agent status visualization. First-time use requires deploying the Star Office service. Once deployed, Agent work status is shown as animated pixel characters.
help.clawswarm_text: Multi-Agent parallel orchestration system. Describe a complex goal and AI auto-decomposes it into a multi-role agent team, managing dependencies and execution via DAG.

gateway.title: Gateway Config
gateway.desc: Gateway is the unified entry point for AI models. All apps connect to models through it.
gateway.save_hint: Click save after changes. Gateway will auto-reload.
gateway.port_hint: Apps connect to Gateway through this port. Default is 18789, usually no need to change.
gateway.bind_loopback_desc: Only apps on this computer can access. Most secure.
gateway.bind_lan_desc: Phones, tablets, and other devices on the same network can also use it.

communication.title: Communication & Automation
communication.desc: Manage how AI behaves across messaging channels: how it replies, supported commands, and how it receives external notifications.
communication.msg_prefix_hint: Auto-prepended prefix for each AI reply. Supports {model}, {provider}, {thinkingLevel} variables. Set to auto to show Agent name.
communication.msg_ack_hint: Emoji reaction auto-added when a message is received (acknowledgement).
communication.msg_remove_ack_hint: Auto-remove the ack emoji after reply is sent.
communication.msg_suppress_errors_hint: Don't show tool execution errors to users.
communication.msg_status_enabled_hint: Use emoji to indicate AI status in messaging channels (thinking, executing tools, done, etc.)
communication.msg_debounce_hint: Wait time to merge rapid consecutive messages (ms).
communication.msg_queue_cap_hint: Maximum length of the pending message queue.
communication.msg_group_history_hint: Number of historical messages to include as context in group chats.
communication.bc_strategy_parallel: Parallel — send to all targets simultaneously
communication.bc_strategy_sequential: Sequential — send one by one, strictly ordered
communication.bc_strategy_hint: Strategy for broadcasting messages to multiple Agents. Parallel is faster, sequential is more controlled.
communication.cmd_text_hint: Allow executing commands via / prefix in chat.
communication.cmd_bash_hint: Allow executing Shell commands via ! prefix or /bash in chat (dangerous).
communication.cmd_debug_hint: Allow viewing debug info in chat.
communication.cmd_native_hint: Auto-register native command menus on supported channels (Telegram, Discord).
communication.hooks_enabled_hint: Allow external services to trigger AI execution via HTTP.
communication.hooks_path_hint: Webhook endpoint path exposed on Gateway.
communication.hooks_token_hint: External requests must include this token in the Header to trigger the webhook.
communication.hooks_session_hint: Session identifier for webhook-triggered Agent sessions. Leave empty for auto-generation.
communication.approvals_section_hint: Forward approval requests to messaging channels when AI requests command execution.
communication.approvals_enabled_hint: Forward exec approval requests to configured messaging channels.
communication.approvals_mode_session: Original session — forward to the requesting session
communication.approvals_mode_targets: Specified targets — forward to configured target channels
communication.approvals_forward_hint: Forward exec approval requests to channels (off by default, enable for low-risk scenarios).

invest_guide.guide_invest_title: Run Through Investment Workbench in 10 Minutes
invest_guide.guide_invest_subtitle: Each step tells you what to do, where to do it, and what counts as done. Follow this chain to run through the full process from leads to approval.
invest_guide.guide_openclaw_subtitle: Follow these 5 steps to take OpenClaw from "installed" to "first Agent actually works".
invest_guide.guide_evosci_subtitle: 4 steps to understand Prospect-Research's configuration, persona evolution, task collaboration, and document export workflow.
invest_guide.guide_star_office_subtitle: 4 steps to complete Star Office deployment, connection, and daily maintenance — display Agent work states as pixel animations in real time.
invest_guide.guide_clawswarm_subtitle: 4 steps to learn multi-Agent parallel collaboration: configure models, describe goals, AI decomposes the team, review DAG and save.
invest_guide.label_default_criteria: Complete the current operation and confirm status change
invest_guide.module_models_desc: After configuring models, let your Agent use them.
invest_guide.module_models_item1_desc: After model configuration, create an Agent to use it.
invest_guide.module_models_item2_desc: Confirm Gateway is running, otherwise Agents cannot call models.
invest_guide.module_models_item3_desc: View the complete Agent training workflow.
invest_guide.module_agents_desc: After creating an Agent, equip it with skills then verify in chat.
invest_guide.module_agents_item1_desc: Check available capabilities on the Skills page to make your Agent stronger.
invest_guide.module_agents_item2_desc: Send a message to confirm the Agent actually works.
invest_guide.module_agents_item3_desc: Connect your Agent to external channels like QQ, Telegram, etc.
invest_guide.module_gateway_desc: Gateway is the bridge for Agents to call models.
invest_guide.module_gateway_item1_desc: Check that at least one model provider is configured and connectable.
invest_guide.module_gateway_item2_desc: Verify Gateway is working properly through Live Chat.
invest_guide.module_gateway_item3_desc: View the complete Agent training workflow.
invest_guide.module_channels_desc: After channel configuration, your Agent can receive messages from external platforms.
invest_guide.module_channels_item1_desc: Channels need to be bound to an available Agent.
invest_guide.module_channels_item2_desc: Channel messages need to be routed to models through Gateway.
invest_guide.module_security_desc: Protect the panel entry point to prevent unauthorized access.
invest_guide.module_security_item1_desc: Synchronize Gateway access token settings for enhanced security.
invest_guide.module_security_item2_desc: Confirm all base environment components are running normally.
invest_guide.module_skills_desc: Confirm your Agent can use these capabilities.
invest_guide.module_skills_item1_desc: Select available Skills when creating or editing an Agent.
invest_guide.module_skills_item2_desc: Trigger a Skill in chat to confirm it works.
invest_guide.step_dashboard_title: Import demo data or confirm existing data
invest_guide.step_dashboard_desc: Get some browsable tasks and samples on the homepage first, so the pipeline, deals, documents, and approvals have a complete chain to explore.
invest_guide.step_dashboard_criteria: The homepage shows demo data, or you've confirmed you'll proceed with real projects.
invest_guide.step_pool_title: Enter or check the first lead in the Deal Pool
invest_guide.step_pool_desc: Add the project name, industry, owner, and current conclusion to the Deal Pool. Don't try to fill everything — just get the lead into the system.
invest_guide.step_pool_criteria: At least one Deal Pool record has a project name and current stage, and you know where to continue adding information.
invest_guide.step_deal_title: Convert to a Deal and advance one stage
invest_guide.step_deal_desc: Convert a project worth following up into a Deal to see how the system records stage progression, key events, and to-dos.
invest_guide.step_deal_criteria: At least one Deal has entered the pipeline, or you understand how the Deal Pool connects to Deals.
invest_guide.step_docs_title: Complete BP, preliminary evaluation, or DD materials
invest_guide.step_docs_desc: Add materials needed for subsequent approvals to the document library, so Deals, SOPs, and approval workflows all work around the same materials.
invest_guide.step_docs_criteria: At least one key document has been uploaded, or you know which documents are needed at each stage.
invest_guide.step_workflow_desc: When materials are mostly complete, push the process to approval or SOP to let the system handle process reminders and decision tracking.
invest_guide.step_workflow_criteria: You've initiated an approval, or clearly know whether the current project should go through approval or execute SOP first.
invest_guide.step_setup_desc: First confirm that Node.js, OpenClaw CLI, and configuration files are all in place. Check the foundation before training your first Agent.
invest_guide.step_setup_criteria: You know which environment component is the bottleneck, or you've already verified Node.js, CLI, and config files are ready.
invest_guide.step_models_desc: Add at least one main model in Model Configuration to ensure Agents and Live Chat have available reasoning capabilities.
invest_guide.step_models_criteria: At least one model is available, and you know which Agent will use the default main model.
invest_guide.step_agents_desc: Create your first Agent with its own identity, model, and workspace — taking it from "platform installed" to "role created".
invest_guide.step_agents_criteria: At least one recognizable Agent appears in the list, and you know its associated model and workspace location.
invest_guide.step_skills_desc: First check available capabilities on the Skills page; if you want the Agent to better match your team's workflow, import soul configuration on the AI Assistant page.
invest_guide.step_skills_criteria: You've confirmed at least one available Skill, or know how to import SOUL/IDENTITY from the assistant page later.
invest_guide.step_chat_desc: Finally, send the first message in Live Chat to confirm Gateway, model, and Agent can actually converse — not just look complete in configuration.
invest_guide.step_chat_criteria: You've successfully sent and received the first reply, confirming this Agent is now in a usable state.
invest_guide.step_evosci_config_desc: Confirm the Prospect-Research bridge can run normally: select Provider, model, and working directory. The status bar must show "Ready" before starting tasks.
invest_guide.step_evosci_config_criteria: Status bar shows "Ready", Provider and model are selected, working directory is confirmed.
invest_guide.step_evosci_persona_desc: Open settings and adjust the 4 style knobs (rigor, proactiveness, restraint, architectural sense). These knobs determine how the Coordinator directs Scientists to collaborate.
invest_guide.step_evosci_persona_criteria: You understand the meaning of the 4 knobs and know how to adjust work style based on task type.
invest_guide.step_evosci_task_desc: Enter a research or analysis task in the chat area and observe how the Coordinator decomposes tasks, assigns Scientists, and aggregates results. Recent conversation history appears on the left.
invest_guide.step_evosci_task_criteria: You've sent a task and observed the Scientists' collaboration process and final output.
invest_guide.step_evosci_export_desc: After task completion, an export panel appears at the bottom. Select the save path (default: desktop), then click the DOCX / HTML / PPTX button — OpenClaw Agent will handle document generation.
invest_guide.step_evosci_export_criteria: You've successfully sent Prospect-Research output to OpenClaw for format conversion.
invest_guide.step_star_deploy_desc: Tauri desktop version supports one-click auto-deployment (requires Python 3.10+ and Git); Web version — follow the page guide to deploy locally or on a server.
invest_guide.step_star_deploy_criteria: Page shows the Star Office iframe interface, status indicator is green or yellow.
invest_guide.step_star_connect_desc: After successful deployment, the pixel office loads automatically. Check the top status indicator — green means service is normal, yellow means loading, red means disconnected.
invest_guide.step_star_connect_criteria: Status indicator turns green, pixel office displays normally. If red, click "Reconnect" button to troubleshoot.
invest_guide.step_star_agent_bind_title: Get your Agent to appear in the office
invest_guide.step_star_agent_bind_desc: Ensure at least one Agent is in an active state. The Agent's work state (chatting, reasoning, idle) will be dynamically displayed as pixel characters in the office.
invest_guide.step_star_agent_bind_criteria: Your Agent has been created and enabled on the Agent Management page. Back in AI Office, you can see the corresponding pixel character.
invest_guide.step_star_customize_desc: Learn the control buttons: Refresh (update status), Open in New Window (standalone fullscreen), Reconnect (recover from service failure), Settings (change connection address).
invest_guide.step_star_customize_criteria: You know the purpose of each control button and can quickly recover from service anomalies.
invest_guide.step_swarm_config_desc: Click the gear button in the top right to open the configuration panel. Select the LLM provider, fill in API Key and model ID; or click "Load from Quick Config" to import existing configuration. Adjust parallelism, max total rounds, and timeout as needed.
invest_guide.step_swarm_config_criteria: Provider, model, and API Key are all filled in the gear panel. Parallelism and round limits meet expectations.
invest_guide.step_swarm_goal_title: Enter task goal or use a template
invest_guide.step_swarm_goal_desc: Describe a complex task in natural language in the text box (e.g., "Help me create a DD report for Company XX"), or click the template buttons below (Deep Research, DD Report, Brainstorm, etc.) to quickly fill in a preset plan.
invest_guide.step_swarm_goal_criteria: The text box has a task description, or a template has been clicked to auto-fill.
invest_guide.step_swarm_decompose_desc: Click the "Analyze Task" button. AI will automatically decompose your goal into multiple roles (researcher, analyst, reviewer, etc.) and set up their dependencies and message whitelists.
invest_guide.step_swarm_decompose_criteria: Page enters review stage, showing DAG visualization and agent table.
invest_guide.step_swarm_review_desc: View agent dependencies in the DAG graph; edit role names, task instructions, capability types, and dependencies in the table; click "Details" to expand advanced settings (reasoning depth, message mailbox, etc.). Click "Save" when confirmed.
invest_guide.step_swarm_review_criteria: DAG validation passed (green check), task saved to history list.
invest_guide.spotlight_welcome_desc: This is the multi-Agent parallel orchestration system. You describe a complex goal, AI automatically decomposes it into a multi-role agent team, managed via DAG for dependencies and execution.
invest_guide.spotlight_goal_desc: Describe the complex task you want to accomplish in natural language, such as "Help me research the competitive landscape of XX industry". The clearer the description, the more accurate the AI team decomposition.
invest_guide.spotlight_template_desc: Not sure what to write? Pick a preset template — Deep Research, DD Report, Brainstorm, Document Review, or Competitor Monitoring — to auto-fill the goal and team configuration.
invest_guide.spotlight_config_desc: Control the number of parallel agents, max total rounds (upper limit of all Agent rounds combined), and timeout. More rounds mean deeper work by Agents.
invest_guide.spotlight_model_desc: Click the gear button to open the configuration panel and set the LLM provider, API Key, and model. This step must be completed before first use.

evoscientist.title: Prospect-Research
evoscientist.desc_chat: Start tasks around the current thread and view key events.
evoscientist.explanation_title: What is Prospect-Research? How does it self-evolve?
evoscientist.explanation_reflect_text: The Coordinator has 4 style knobs — Rigor, Initiative, Restraint, Architecture — and after each task it observes Scientists' behavior (who was called, quality of output), then fine-tunes its own guidance style.
evoscientist.explanation_evolve_text: Evolution comes from 4 paths: manual knob tuning · syncing persona from local AI assistant snapshot · inheriting OpenClaw Agent soul config · auto-inferring from task text keywords. The 5 Scientist types (Review, Research, Synthesis, Execution, Topic) also adapt by task type.
evoscientist.explanation_diff_text: OpenClaw is the infrastructure runtime: Gateway + single Agent for model scheduling and tool calls. Prospect-Research is the collaboration layer: one Coordinator directing specialized Scientists with an evolvable persona system, ideal for complex research, analysis, and document generation.

ai_quick_config.tutorial_provider_title: What is an AI Model Provider?
ai_quick_config.tutorial_provider_content: AI model providers are platforms that offer LLM inference services. Different providers host different AI models with varying prices and speeds. Recommended (China): MiniMax, DeepSeek, Moonshot (Kimi), SiliconFlow, Alibaba Cloud Bailian Recommended (International): OpenAI, Anthropic, Google Gemini You need to register with at least one provider to use AI features. Most providers offer free credits for trial.
ai_quick_config.tutorial_apikey_title: What is an API Key? How to get one?
ai_quick_config.tutorial_apikey_content: An API Key is a secret string that verifies your identity and billing permissions. It's like a "key" that allows your software to call AI services. Steps: 1. Register on the provider's website 2. Go to API / Developer settings 3. Create a new API Key 4. Copy the key and paste it in the input field below Note: API Keys are private credentials. Do not share them or post them publicly.
ai_quick_config.tutorial_model_title: What are Tokens? How do models differ?
ai_quick_config.tutorial_model_content: Tokens are the smallest units AI models process. About 1 Chinese character = 1-2 tokens, 1 English word = 1-3 tokens. API billing is usually based on token count. Differences between models: - Intelligence: Larger models (e.g., GPT-5.4, Claude Sonnet 4.5) have stronger reasoning but cost more - Speed: Smaller models (e.g., GPT-4o Mini, Qwen Turbo) respond faster - Context window: Determines how much text a model can process at once. 128K ~ about 100K words - Reasoning: Models marked "reasoning" excel at logic and math but respond slower Tip: Start with a mid-size model (e.g., DeepSeek V3, Qwen Plus) for a good balance of cost and quality.

comp_agent_wizard.opt_agent_type_research: Focused on analysis, synthesis, and knowledge organization — ideal for research and decision support.
comp_agent_wizard.opt_agent_type_execute: Focused on execution and task delivery — ideal for handling clear instructions.
comp_agent_wizard.opt_agent_type_plan: Focused on solution design and multi-step coordination — ideal for planning and scheduling.
comp_agent_wizard.opt_agent_type_write: Focused on writing output and language polishing — ideal for writing and expression tasks.
comp_agent_wizard.opt_agent_type_visual: Focused on creative expression and visual collaboration — ideal for posters, slides, and design prompts.
comp_agent_wizard.opt_agent_type_support: Focused on external responses and issue routing — ideal for stable communication scenarios.
comp_agent_wizard.opt_agent_type_debug: Focused on issue diagnosis and providing fix paths — ideal for technical troubleshooting.
comp_agent_wizard.opt_agent_type_organize: Focused on archiving, summarization, and information structuring — ideal for data processing.
comp_agent_wizard.opt_identity_keep: Preserve the existing persona as much as possible, only supplement rules and boundaries.
comp_agent_wizard.opt_identity_minor: Retain the original positioning, but rewrite responsibilities and applicable scenarios.
comp_agent_wizard.opt_identity_major: Allow significant adjustments to the current Agent's role definition.
comp_agent_wizard.opt_scenario_invest: Centered around industry, company, market, and material analysis.
comp_agent_wizard.opt_scenario_resume: Focused on candidate matching, summarization, and screening recommendations.
comp_agent_wizard.opt_scenario_travel: Handling itineraries, budgets, routes, and precautions.
comp_agent_wizard.opt_scenario_greeting: Emphasis on writing expression, context, and tone control.
comp_agent_wizard.opt_scenario_ppt: Focus on creative direction, visual structure, and material suggestions.
comp_agent_wizard.opt_scenario_office: Suitable for meetings, documents, organization, and general collaboration tasks.
comp_agent_wizard.opt_scenario_custom: You define the business objectives, and AI generates settings based on custom scenarios.
comp_agent_wizard.opt_role_general: Takes tasks and pushes forward — suitable for daily general collaboration.
comp_agent_wizard.opt_role_research: Emphasizes analysis, judgment, and evidence organization.
comp_agent_wizard.opt_role_planning: Emphasizes task decomposition, scheduling, and multi-step execution.
comp_agent_wizard.opt_role_writing: Emphasizes expression quality, structure, and tone.
comp_agent_wizard.opt_role_recruit: Emphasizes screening criteria, comparison, and candidate recommendations.
comp_agent_wizard.opt_role_creative: Emphasizes creative direction, style, and visual expression.
comp_agent_wizard.opt_role_customer: Emphasizes stable responses, clear boundaries, and user experience.
comp_agent_wizard.opt_role_tech: Emphasizes issue diagnosis, providing fix paths, and risk alerts.
comp_agent_wizard.opt_role_content: Emphasizes summarization, categorization, and information structuring.
comp_agent_wizard.opt_audience_self: Intended for the current user only, communication is more direct.
comp_agent_wizard.opt_audience_team: Suitable for internal collaboration, prioritizes handoff consistency.
comp_agent_wizard.opt_audience_external: Emphasizes careful wording, clear boundaries, and user experience.
comp_agent_wizard.opt_audience_both: Balances professionalism and readability — suitable for mixed scenarios.
comp_agent_wizard.opt_style_direct: Results first, minimal preamble — suitable for high-frequency workflows.
comp_agent_wizard.opt_style_patient: More suitable for onboarding, support, and explanatory tasks.
comp_agent_wizard.opt_style_action: Emphasizes action steps and execution rhythm.
comp_agent_wizard.opt_style_consultant: More suitable for scenarios requiring conclusions with reasoning.
comp_agent_wizard.opt_sub_agent_no: All responsibilities stay within one Agent — simplest structure.
comp_agent_wizard.opt_sub_agent_yes: Explicitly delegate specific responsibilities to a dedicated sub-Agent.
comp_agent_wizard.opt_sub_agent_maybe: Reserve collaboration interfaces for now, decide on splitting later.
comp_agent_wizard.opt_collab_dispatch: More suitable for clear division of labor, with the main Agent as the final gatekeeper.
comp_agent_wizard.opt_collab_draft: More suitable for producing drafts first, then unified polishing and integration.
comp_agent_wizard.opt_collab_fixed: More suitable for stable, fixed sub-tasks that don't handle the main workflow.
comp_agent_wizard.opt_inherit_all: Maintain the parent Agent's values and collaboration approach.
comp_agent_wizard.opt_inherit_tone: Consistent style, but the workflow can be more independent.
comp_agent_wizard.opt_inherit_workflow: Similar work approach, but independent output style.
comp_agent_wizard.opt_inherit_none: Generate as an independent role, not tightly bound to the parent Agent's settings.
